name: leafwriter
description: xml editing and rdf annotation using github as document store

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service & npm run dev -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.dev-worker: npm run dev -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service & npm run dev-worker -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.build-commons: npm run build -w @cwrc/leafwriter-storage-service && npm run build -w @cwrc/leafwriter-validator && npm run build -w leafwriter-commons
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run dev -w leafwriter-commons & npm run dev -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:linux: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:linux -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:linux:amd64: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:linux:amd64 -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:linux:arm64: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:linux:arm64 -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:flatpak: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:linux:flatpak -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:flatpak:ci: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:linux:flatpak:ci -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
scripts.build:desktop:arch: npm run build-commons && npm run build -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop && npm run package:dir -w le-jean-baptiste-desktop
